text: Oil likely will stabilize here around $80. A key pivot point. What the future brings will determine if this runs closer to $90 or $70. From what I'm seeing, I'm predicting the latter. Expect some chop from here. Place your bets accordingly. #OOTT

And then let’s not forget how fragile the situation is…Netanyahu just told Trump Israeli forces will NOT withdraw from Lebanon, and Israel does NOT consider itself bound by the Lebanon clause in the US-Iran MoU. Directly rejecting of a core pillar of the deal. #OOTT
